title: Change the color of the tabs in the currently open view
excerpt:
I have created multiple board views, but it is difficult to know which view I have open when using them.

posts.author: monomono (Moe Nomura)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created multiple board views, but it is difficult to know which view I have open when using them.
Please implement a function to identify which view is currently open, such as changing the color of the tab of the currently open view.

posts.author: monomono (Moe Nomura)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think it was implemented today!
The bottom of the tabs are now blue!
Thanks a lot!

ありがとう（arigato)
